data.title: Long Paws | Exceptional Dog Accessories | UK
data.metaDescription: Long Paws produces dog accessories for active dogs. Our dog accessories are made to keep you and your dog safe, allowing you to enjoy your walks. Our range includes Dog Water Bottles, Dog Collars, Dog Harnesses, Rope Leashes, Locking Leashes, Anti-Shock Leashes, Tick Removers, Dog Tags, & Poo Bag Carriers.
data.ogTitle: Long Paws | Exceptional Dog Accessories | UK
data.ogDescription: Long Paws produces dog accessories for active dogs. Our dog accessories are made to keep you and your dog safe, allowing you to enjoy your walks. Our range includes Dog Water Bottles, Dog Collars, Dog Harnesses, Rope Leashes, Locking Leashes, Anti-Shock Leashes, Tick Removers, Dog Tags, & Poo Bag Carriers.

issues.impact: Google truncates long descriptions. Your call-to-action is probably getting cut off.
issues.fix: Trim to 150-160 characters. Put the most important info first.

issues.impact: Search engines use H1s to understand what your page is about. You're invisible.
issues.fix: Add exactly one H1 per page that clearly describes the page content

summary: We analyzed www.longpaws.co.uk and found 2 issues affecting your search visibility and conversions. The biggest opportunities are fixing your meta tags, improving mobile optimization, and adding structured data for rich snippets. These changes could significantly increase your organic traffic within 30-60 days.
